category_sources: Official GTK Pango page describes it as a library for laying out and rendering text with internationalization.
source_facts.description says Pango is a framework for layout and rendering of i18n text.
display_name_sources: Official GTK and GNOME documentation use the name Pango.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Pages API reference provides Pango 1.0 documentation.
Official GTK architecture page links to Pango documentation and source.
repo_sources: Official GNOME Pango API reference lists Source as https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/pango/.
Official GTK Pango page states the Pango source is available on GNOME GitLab at https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/pango.
tags_sources: Official GTK Pango page describes text layout, rendering, internationalization, font backends, Cairo integration, and GTK text/font handling.
